reviews.author: Bhavya Patel
reviews.review_body: Sattva is one of the best school in Ahmedabad. The environment is great, teachers are extremely helpful and they make study fun. I highly recommend it.

reviews.author: Swanti Jain
reviews.review_body:
Staff and teachers are really supportive.
👍⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.author: Devendra Gurjar
reviews.review_body: It was an amazing and jubilant experience ....made lots of friends and faculties were excellent

reviews.author: Om Satyawan Pathak
reviews.review_body: Teachers and Staff members are very supportive. Recently graduated from here with flying colours in my HSC course. Proud to remain a Sattvite for the rest of my life.

reviews.author: Anee Brahmbhatt
reviews.review_body: I studied in Sattva Vikas from KG to 12th and i have to say that this school provides the best environment for students to grow by providing them with extracurricular activities and fun interactive sessions. Had the best times and some of the most memorable moments at this very place.

reviews.author: Manaram Desai
reviews.review_body: Do you need a physical teacher in your school?

reviews.author: Richa attrishi tyagi
reviews.review_body: I learnt there to spend my time in good manner and also learn to manage my routine. School's daily activities encourage me to do my job more perfectly. It teaches me how to tackle responsibilities. School work place culture is seen in good discipline form

reviews.author: Khyati Makwana
reviews.review_body:
HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS SCHOOL! The administration, the infrastructure, the staff of teachers, the lively environment is one of the best. The care and attention they give to the students by far exceeds any of our expectations.
If you are looking for the best education, for your child in Ahmedabad, you need to pay visit to Sattva Vikas School. Right from the very beginning you get to experience & see the hard work & the efforts taken by the entire team of Sattva. The core curriculum of the primary & middle school includes the best of the board. This integrated curriculum makes your child’s learning experience very easy& stress free. Even in the pandemic situation the process of teaching & leaning had not come to a standstill.
Kudos to the entire team!
